form:Form.name: NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.Reporte.Formulario649Portal.filter.form

form:CheckBox.label: Obtener Formulario 649 del año anterior incluyendo el ajuste
form:CheckBox.name: l_anioAnterior

form:SButton.label: Eliminar el elemento de la Lista
form:SButton.descrip: Eliminar el elemento de la Lista
form:SButton.name: Delete

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql('
SELECT LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion as id, LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.c_liquidacion as CODIGO, LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.d_titulo as LIQUIDACION, LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.f_cierre as f_cierre
FROM LIQ19_LIQUIDACION
WHERE LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion IN ({%=#SOURCE:@ids%})
ORDER BY f_cierre DESC
')ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LC.oi_liquidacion AS id FROM LIQ19_EJECUCIONES AS E , LIQ99_LIQUIDACION AS L , LIQ99_RECIBOS AS R , LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER AS T , LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ AS PL , LIQ19_LIQUIDACION AS LC JOIN E.oi_liquidacion_ddo INNER L.oi_liquidacion_ddo , L.oi_liquidacion_ddo INNER R.oi_liquidacion_ddo , R.oi_tot_liq_per INNER T.oi_tot_liq_per , E.oi_liquidacion INNER PL.oi_liquidacion , L.c_liquidacion INNER LC.c_liquidacion WHERE L.c_estado = \'F\' AND LC.e_periodo = {#SOURCE:@periodo} AND PL.oi_personal_emp = {#SOURCE:@oi_personal_emp} GROUP BY LC.oi_liquidacion ')ROWS/ROW
